description: Prepare a reviewed customer-facing launch artifact using current product authority, approved claims, brand constraints, and campaign conditions.
expected_behaviors: Use active material authority for factual claims.
Declare prompt lineage and provider route.
Hold or escalate when approved claim authority is missing.
Emit a witness before reviewed standing.
Require named review before external release.
Require revalidation after a material version changes.
Preserve replay trace rather than overwrite prior standing.
